description:
Having a car insurance policy keeps you tension-free. It helps you financially during crucial times and offers coverage against financial liabilities during accidents and mishaps. 
But ClAIM REJECTION can result to Utter disappointment & frustration. 

If you have got your Car Insurance policy, you must know the Reasons why your Car Insurance / Motor Insurance Claim can be denied & Try avoiding them 😊

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

comments.text: Medam, policy bazaar ke dwara chola ms ki car policy li thi bad me turant CPA policy alag li thi  ab car accident me owner ki death ho gai hai, car ki poliynumber aur CPA policy number alag hai, 2023 me car ka claim hua tha ab accident me car owner ki death ho gai hai chola MS Wale bata rahe hai aapki policy reject ho gai hai kyuki aapne NCB galat chuna hai ,to CPA policy ka 15 lakh ka cover bhi reject Kiya hai to kya kare please janakari dijiye aapki kripa hogi, chalti car me heart attack Aya tha aur accident me lever bhi fat Gaya tha, PM report, FIR, sab document diye hai fir bhi, rejection letter bhi nahi dete to kya kare, consumer court me complaint kare(online kare ya offline)
